description: M5 Templates + Marketplace — Template schema, 6 built-in templates, GitHub-backed store, install/publish

userStories.title: Create templates database table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a table to store pipeline templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/db/schema/templates.ts with id, workspaceId, name, description, category ('workflow'|'agent-config'|'template'|'mcp-adapter'), chainDefinition (JSON), author, version, isBuiltIn (boolean), installCount (integer default 0), createdAt, updatedAt
Update barrel export in schema/index.ts
Migration generates and runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create 6 built-in pipeline templates
userStories.description: As a user, I want starter templates to quickly set up common pipeline patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/templates/built-in.ts with 6 template definitions

Templates: 'Full Stack Build' (trigger→builder→tester→reviewer), 'Security Audit' (trigger→auditor), 'Code Review' (trigger→reviewer), 'Rapid Prototype' (trigger→prototyper→builder), 'Test Suite' (trigger→tester), 'Full Pipeline' (trigger→prototyper→builder→tester→reviewer→auditor)
Each template includes complete chainDefinition JSON with nodes and edges
Seed function inserts templates on first run if templates table is empty
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create templates REST API endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need endpoints to list, create, and apply templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/routes/templates.ts as a Fastify plugin
GET /api/templates returns all templates (built-in + user-created)
GET /api/templates/:id returns a single template
POST /api/templates creates a user template from current chain definition
POST /api/templates/:id/apply applies a template to a project (copies chainDefinition to project)
DELETE /api/templates/:id deletes a user template (cannot delete built-in)
Input validation on POST bodies
Register routes in server/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create marketplace store schema and types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need types and schema for marketplace items from the GitHub-backed store.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/marketplace/types.ts with MarketplaceItem type: id, name, description, type (workflow|agent-config|template|mcp-adapter), author, version, trustTier (community|verified|official), installCount, lastUpdated, repoUrl, downloadUrl
Create server/marketplace/client.ts with MarketplaceClient class
fetchItems(filters?) fetches the store index from a configurable GitHub repo URL
getItem(id) fetches a single item's metadata
downloadItem(id) downloads the item's package (JSON file)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Store is backed by insomniac-dev/store GitHub repo. For now, use a mock/local index.

userStories.title: Create marketplace REST API endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need endpoints to browse and install marketplace items.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/routes/marketplace.ts as a Fastify plugin
GET /api/marketplace returns paginated marketplace items with optional filters (type, trustTier, search)
GET /api/marketplace/:id returns a single item detail
POST /api/marketplace/:id/install downloads and installs an item (creates template or ability)
Input validation on query params and POST body
Register routes in server/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create marketplace API hooks for frontend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TanStack Query hooks for marketplace and templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/api/templates.ts with useTemplates(), useApplyTemplate(), useCreateTemplate() hooks
Create src/api/marketplace.ts with useMarketplace(filters), useMarketplaceItem(id), useInstallItem() hooks
All mutations invalidate relevant query keys
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Marketplace main view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse the marketplace from the main view (PRD US-6).
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/views/MarketplaceView.tsx
Grid layout showing marketplace items as cards
Each card shows: name, type badge, trust tier badge, author, install count, description preview
Search input for filtering by name/description
Category filter tabs: All, Workflows, Agent Configs, Templates, MCP Adapters
Add 'marketplace' to MainView routing
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add one-click install button to marketplace items
userStories.description: As a user, I want to install marketplace items with a single click (PRD US-6).
acceptanceCriteria: Each marketplace card has an 'Install' button
Clicking calls useInstallItem() mutation
Button shows loading state during install
Success shows a check icon and 'Installed' text
Error shows error message inline
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update Marketplace sidebar panel with real data
userStories.description: As a user, I want the marketplace sidebar to show real categories and navigate to the marketplace view.
acceptanceCriteria: Update LeftSidebar marketplace panel to show category buttons that set filters and navigate to marketplace view
Show featured/popular items preview (top 3 by install count)
Clicking a category opens MarketplaceView with that filter active
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add template picker to chain editor
userStories.description: As a user, I want to start a new pipeline from a template in the chain editor.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Start from template' option to the chain editor empty state
Shows a list of available templates (built-in + user-created)
Clicking a template calls useApplyTemplate() and loads the chain
Also accessible from ChainToolbar as 'Load template' button
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add 'Save as template' to chain editor toolbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save my current chain as a reusable template.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Save as template' button to ChainToolbar
Clicking opens a form: template name, description, category dropdown
Submit calls useCreateTemplate() with current chain definition
Success shows confirmation toast/message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
